title: Chore: Migrate to new package manager
original_text: Migrated from npm to pnpm for faster installs and better disk space usage. Updated CI/CD pipelines to use pnpm. Updated Docker images to use pnpm. Migrated lock files from package-lock.json to pnpm-lock.yaml. Updated documentation with pnpm commands. Added pnpm scripts for common tasks. Result: build and install times reduced by 40%.
expected_subject: chore(deps): migrate from npm to pnpm
expected_body_lines: - Update CI/CD pipelines to use pnpm
- Add pnpm scripts for common tasks
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(deps): migrate from npm to pnpm"
